zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh II de Gournay於1030年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Hugues de Gournay41歲，母親Beatrix de Foucarmont35歲。他於1051年之後與Basilia de Fleitel結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1101年10月18日在法國享年71歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪艾勒 貝-盧易。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gournay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Gourley  .

variants.name: Gourley
meanings: Scottish: possibly a Norman habitational name from North or South Gorley (Hampshire), or an unidentified place in Normandy, France.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh II de Gournay was born in 1030, in Normandy, France, his father, Hugues de Gournay, was 41 and his mother, Beatrix de Foucarmont, was 35. He married Basilia de Fleitel after 1051. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 18 October 1101, in France, at the age of 71, and was buried in Le Bec-Hellouin, Eure, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh II de Gournay est né en 1030, à Normandie, France, son père, Hugues de Gournay, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Beatrix de Foucarmont, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Basilia de Fleitel après 1051. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 18 octobre 1101, à France, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Le Bec-Hellouin, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh II de Gournay 1030 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues de Gournay 41 und seine Mutter Beatrix de Foucarmont 35. Er hat nach 1051 Basilia de Fleitel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Oktober 1101 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Frankreich und wurde in Le Bec-Hellouin, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh II de Gournay è nato il nel 1030 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues de Gournay, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Beatrix de Foucarmont, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Basilia de Fleitel dopo il 1051. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 18 ottobre 1101, nel Francia, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Le Bec-Hellouin, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh II de Gournayが1030年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Hugues de Gournayは41歳，母Beatrix de Foucarmontは35歳であった。1051年以後にBasilia de Fleitelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1101年10月18日にフランスで71歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアル ベク-ヘロウインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh II de Gournay(이)가 1030년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues de Gournay(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix de Foucarmont(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1051년 이후 Basilia de Fleitel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1101년 10월 18일 프랑스에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 일 베c-헬루인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh II de Gournay nasceu em 1030, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Hugues de Gournay, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix de Foucarmont, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Basilia de Fleitel após 1051. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1101, em França, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Le Bec-Hellouin, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh II de Gournay родился в 1030 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues de Gournay было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrix de Foucarmont, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Basilia de Fleitel после 1051 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 18 октября 1101 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности л бек-хеллуин, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh II de Gournay nació en 1030, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Hugues de Gournay, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Beatrix de Foucarmont, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Basilia de Fleitel después de 1051. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 18 de octubre de 1101, en Francia, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Le Bec-Hellouin, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
